applyTo: "**/*.php,**/*.inc,**/*.js,**/*.mjs,**/*.cjs,**/*.ts,**/*.tsx,**/*.jsx,**/*.sql,**/*.yml,**/*.yaml,**/*.json"

# Segurança (AppSec)
